title: ‘Doctor Who’ Fans Have Fresh Chance to Time Travel With Found Episodes
summary_full: Two unearthed episodes, which were discovered in film canisters wrapped in plastic bags among the possessions of a dead collector in England, were restored by BBC archivists.
summary_public: Two unearthed episodes, which were discovered in film canisters wrapped in plastic bags among the possessions of a dead collector in England, were restored by BBC archivists.
